title: Divine Relics
description: God of War content in Minecraft!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10af831ba209a89d67537de6af96664b1adf28cd.png)

> _“The **nature** of a thing is more important than the **form of a thing**.” — Brok_
## Mod's trailer:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YH9qYa70hYM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 

[Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/divine-relics)

**Warning:** If you play with shaders via [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus), make sure to also download [Iris/Oculus & GeckoLib Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckoanimfix), otherwise you **won't be able to see Divine Relics mob animations**!

**Dependencies:** Divine Relics requires [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) and [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)!

**Divine Relics** is an adventure mod that introduces content from the **God of War** games into Minecraft, focusing mainly on the last two games set in the Norse pantheon.

Uncover hidden **structures** and ancient **dungeons**, discover and mine rare, long-forgotten **ores**, craft extraordinary **tools**, wield legendary **weapons** and **relics**, encounter formidable **enemies**, and engage in epic **boss fights** that challenge your skills and strategy!

## Mod's features:
- A complete guidebook with the lore explanation
- Detailed config covering many aspects of the mod allowing easy customization for players
- Custom structures and dungeons
- New ores and tool tiers
- Legendary weapons and relics from the games with new combat mechanics
- Mobs and bosses with custom animations 

The mod is currently available only on Forge, but it may receive a Fabric update in the future.
## Credits
Huge shoutout to the following people who helped creating this project a lot:
- My best friend **Caranthir** who helped with testing, building, and provided various ideas. 
- [Szombie](https://modrinth.com/user/Szombie) for the beautiful Leviathan Axe, Draupnir Spear, Mjölnir, and Guardian Shield models! You should definitely check out his other works — this guy is a genius.

## How can I start?

<details>
<summary>Survival Mode</summary>
Upon spawning into the world, you receive a guidebook on Divine Relics. Dive into its pages to familiarize yourself with its contents. Progress through your adventure to gradually unveil new information and notes, ultimately leading you to all the legendary relics! 
</details>

<details>
<summary>Creative Mode</summary>
If you're looking to quickly explore the mod's features without diving into extended gameplay, simply grant yourself all the achievements from Divine Relics with the following command:
  
```
/advancement grant @p from divinerelics:root
```

  This will unlock all the information in the guidebook, allowing you to discover and read about everything the mod has to offer right away.

</details>
